emptyRecordHint: Open the browser extension and start recording. A demo will be created automatically in the space you choose.
connectDetectingDescription: Please wait while DocFlow checks that DocFlow Recorder is installed and available.
connectAuthorizingDescription: Creating a one-time authorization and saving it securely in this browser. No service URL or pairing code is required.
connectSuccessDescription: Your connection has been saved. Return to your app, open the extension, and start recording.
connectErrorTitle: Could not connect the browser extension
connectCloseHint: This page will try to close automatically. If it stays open, you can return to DocFlow manually.
title: My demos
subtitle: Organize content by product and tag, then manage sharing, analytics, and exports.
extensionConnected: The browser extension is connected. You will not need to enter a service URL or pairing code again.
extensionNotDetected: The DocFlow browser extension was not detected. Install or reload it, then refresh this page.
extensionConnectFailed: Could not connect the browser extension. Reload it and try again.
pairHint: Enter this code in the extension within 10 minutes.
emptyFiltered: No matching resources in this category
emptyHint: Create a demo or adjust the category, status, and tag filters.

messages.deleteConfirm: Delete the selected {{count}} demos? This cannot be undone.
messages.shareFailed: Could not create a share link. Make sure the demo contains at least one step.
messages.revokeConfirm: Stop sharing “{{title}}”? Its existing link will stop working immediately.
messages.moved: Resources moved to the new category.
messages.merged: Created “{{title}}”. The original resources were kept.

categoryDialog.title: Manage categories
categoryDialog.subtitle: Create up to two levels and use colors to identify product lines
categoryDialog.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Its resources will become uncategorized.
categoryDialog.empty: No categories yet. Create a product category to get started.

tagDialog.title: Manage tags
tagDialog.subtitleManage: Create tags for global search and organization
tagDialog.deleteConfirm: Delete the “{{name}}” tag? Resources will not be deleted.
tagDialog.empty: Enter a name to create your first tag.

mergeDialog.title: Merge demos
mergeDialog.subtitle: Keep the originals and create an editable demo in the order below
mergeDialog.name: New demo name
mergeDialog.validateSteps: Steps will be validated when merged
